nodes.title: Download the FLOAT model
widgets_values: Download the official FLOAT Model Weights Here (Direct HuggingFace Download)." [FLOAT model](https://huggingface.co/set-soft/float/resolve/main/FLOAT.safetensors?download=true)

nodes.title: Input youre Audio here
widgets_values: Audio Input RequirementsLoad your master track here. For optimal latent synchronization and emotion mapping, ensure the audio contains clear, isolated voice data. Avoid any background noise, environmental hums, or ambient music, as acoustic interference can degrade the precision of the generated lip movements."

nodes.title: FLOAT Face Align
widgets_values: "This node automates image scaling and aspect ratio validation. It utilizes intelligent face detection to automatically crop and center the avatar, ensuring the face is perfectly positioned for the subsequent latent video inference. Enable this node if your source image requires automated centering or resizing."

nodes.title: SET Video Frames
widgets_values:
Function: Translates raw audio duration into exact latent frame dimensions.

Target FPS: 30.0 Production Math (2026 Script): 26 Seconds x 30 FPS = 780 Frames total (audio_num_frames).

VRAM Benefit: Locks the generation length early, preventing early buffer overflows during long multi-sampler diffusion passes."

nodes.title: Here you can Load up youre Image
widgets_values: Input Image SpecificationsFor optimal latent diffusion results, load a square image locked to 512x512 pixels. The subject's face must be dead-centered, maintaining an approximate 60% boundary margin to allow the audio-driven engine sufficient canvas for natural jaw and neck movements."

nodes.title: FLOAT SAMPLE MOTION SEQUENCE
widgets_values:
Function: Synthesizes audio data and avatar frames into a fluid latent video 

sequence.a_cfg_scale (2.0): Audio strength multiplier. Higher values force tighter lip-sync but increase OOM/artifact risks on low-VRAM cards.

seed (1 / fixed): Standardizes non-verbal micro-movements for predictable, multi-pass VFX benchmarking."

Video Helper Suite VHS, download via ComfyUI Manager or the Github Repo:
[Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite.git)

FLOAT Advanced Options, download via ComfyUI Manager or the Github Repo:
[set-soft/ComfyUI-FLOAT_Optimized](https://github.com/set-soft/ComfyUI-FLOAT_Optimized.git)

Generates an mp4 Video with an with Background - this is some Codec-specific. 

If you need the Video with a background use the WEbM - Export Format.  

LOOK AT THE VIDEO COMBINE NODE PLACE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE WORKFLOW. 

Here you can see we send the Float Output directly into the BiRefNet-Workflow to seperate Genna from the Background. 

To Post Prosess your Video just the Load Video instead of the FLOAT Decode Latents to Images (Ad) into the LayerMask: BiRefNet Ultra V2

IF >> a_cfg_scale is set to NAN - set it to 1 or higher

IF >> e_cfg_scale is set to NAN - set it to 1 or higher

FOR SEED - Just set a Seed

nodes.title: FLOAT Encode Emotion
widgets_values:
LATENT EMOTION INJECTOR:Function: Maps facial micro-expressions directly to the latent space based on emotional states.

emotion Selection: Choose the primary expression (e.g., disgust, neutral, happy).

VFX Impact: Adjusts brow tension and facial micro-movements to sync with the audio track's overall mood."

USE THIS FORMAT FOR VIDEOS WITH TRANSPARENT BACKGROUND 

USE >> image/webp

nodes.title: load Video to remove background
widgets_values: Load your Video File for Background Separation here

Generates an MP4 video with a white background - this is codec-specific.

If you need the video with a background, use the WebM export format.

LOOK AT THE VIDEO COMBINE NODE PLACED IN THE MIDDLE OF THE WORKFLOW.

Here you can see we send the Float output directly into the BiRefNet workflow to separate Genna from the background.

To post-process your video, just use the Load Video instead of the Float output into the LayerMask: BiRefNet Ultra V2 - 

I made a node switch - just activate or deactivate:Float Workflow / Video Post Process

Match the framerate.

Send your avatar audio to the Video Combine.

nodes.title: Final Output Video with separated background
widgets_values:
Set the Filenam to anything - 

separated_background or NoBackground or ..._...
